---
name: Rollback failure
about: Report a rollback that did not restore the previous state
title: "[Rollback] "
labels: bug, rollback
assignees: ""
---

## Rollback type

- file migration rollback
- registry rollback

## Rollback reference

Include the run id or backup id if you have it.

## What was supposed to be restored?

Describe the original state.

## What actually happened?

Describe the failure symptoms and any message shown by the app.
